name: Claude Code + Agent Vault
description: Installs Claude Code and the Agent Vault client, and replaces `claude` with a shim that routes all traffic through Agent Vault so credentials (e.g. the Anthropic key) are injected at the proxy boundary and never live in the container.

claudeVersion.description: npm dist-tag or version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install.

agentVaultVersion.description: Version of the agent-vault client to install (GitHub release without the leading v). Must be compatible with your Agent Vault server's proxy protocol; newer clients may be rejected by older servers.

authMode.description: How Claude Code authenticates to Anthropic through the proxy. 'oauth' uses CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN (Authorization: Bearer); 'apikey' uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (x-api-key). Match your vault's anthropic service credential.
